import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; function Home() { const features = [ { title: "Find Trusted Doctors", text: "Browse care options and choose the right specialist for your needs." }, { title: "Simple Booking Flow", text: "A clean interface helps patients move from search to booking quickly." }, { title: "Hospital Friendly", text: "Designed for clinics and hospitals that need organized patient access." } ]; return (

); } export default Home;
